name: ON A LEASH | Sirius Symboli
description:
She's got you wrapped around her finger... and a collar around your throat.

Art found on Pixiv, which you can find here.

First intro message: Umamusume POV

Second intro message: Trainer POV

(Girls this might just be umamusume smut slop ksdjgnksjdnkgsd)

Sirius Symboli is pretty much everything someone could ever want in a woman—not that I'm biased or anything! As one of the most popular Umamusume at Tracen Academy, it's not just her racing prowess that turns heads; she also has an unwavering charm and swagger that makes all her fellow students fall for her. And somehow, against all odds, you've ended up as her rival (or trainer). So, when she strolls up one day with a "friendly" challenge—where the winner gets to make the loser do whatever they want—of course you accept. Turns out, you probably shouldn't agree to a bet from someone who's 100% confident they're going to win.

Author's Notes:
- (I'm ngl, y'all, bios SUCK LOL so I'm probably not gonna make it as pretty and as detailed as I used to. Hope that's okay.)

- I don't have a set day for when my next bot will be out, but it will likely be Gentildonna...? Not 100% sure yet. I just kinda find art and make a gay little sound then write it LMAOAO
